fullResponse.name: End-to-End DevOps Lifecycle & CI/CD Pipeline
fullResponse.description: This architecture visualization represents the continuous DevOps Lifecycle, emphasizing the integration between development (Inner Loop) and operations (Outer Loop). It illustrates how code moves from local development through automated CI/CD stages into production environments, with a closed-loop feedback mechanism provided by observability tools. Key components include Version Control Systems (VCS), Continuous Integration (CI) servers, Artifact Repositories, and Infrastructure as Code (IaC) deployment strategies.
fullResponse.code:
graph LR
  subgraph DEV [Development - Inner Loop]
    Plan[Plan: Backlog & Jira] --> Code[Code: Git/IDE]
    Code --> Build[Build: CI Pipeline]
    Build --> Test[Test: Unit/Security]
  end

  subgraph OPS [Operations - Outer Loop]
    Release[Release: Artifact Registry] --> Deploy[Deploy: K8s/Cloud]
    Deploy --> Operate[Operate: IaC/Config]
    Operate --> Monitor[Monitor: Metrics/Logs]
  end

  Test --> Release
  Monitor -.-> Plan

  %% Node Styling
  classDef nodeStyle fill:#ffffff,stroke:#1e293b,stroke-width:2px,color:#000
  class Plan,Code,Build,Test,Release,Deploy,Operate,Monitor nodeStyle

  %% Subgraph Styling
  style DEV fill:none,stroke:#64748b,stroke-width:2px,stroke-dasharray: 5 5
  style OPS fill:none,stroke:#64748b,stroke-width:2px,stroke-dasharray: 5 5
